description: Updates an existing Custom Field for a given company ID. The `type` property cannot be modified after creation.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

schema.description: Request body for updating a Custom Field.

name.description: The updated name of the Custom Field.

can_filter.description: If true, allows this field to be used as a filter.

integration_only.description: If true, only integrations can update this field.

on_projects.description: If true, the field is available on Projects.

on_people.description: If true, the field is available on People.

description.description: A description to help Admin users understand the field’s purpose.

values.description: Only applicable for `select` or `multi-select` fields. Replaces the entire list of values.

sort_by.description: Controls sorting of dropdown values. `alpha` sorts alphabetically, while `listed` maintains the provided order.
